title: magnolia fallax
intro: Magnolia fallax, also known as the Southern Sweetshrub, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Magnolia fallax include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Magnolia fallax can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to soothe sore throats and skin irritations.
